00030 #include <types.h>
00031 #include <lib.h>
00032 #include <platform/bus.h>
00033 #include <lamebus/ltrace.h>
00034 #include "autoconf.h"
00035 
00036 /* Registers (offsets within slot) */
00037 #define LTRACE_REG_TRON    0
00038 #define LTRACE_REG_TROFF   4
00039 #define LTRACE_REG_DEBUG   8
00040 #define LTRACE_REG_DUMP    12
00041 
00042 static struct ltrace_softc *the_trace;
00043 
00044 void
00045 ltrace_on(uint32_t code)
00046 {
00047         if (the_trace != NULL) {
00048                 bus_write_register(the_trace->lt_busdata, the_trace->lt_buspos,
00049                                    LTRACE_REG_TRON, code);
00050         }
00051 }
00052 
00053 void
00054 ltrace_off(uint32_t code)
00055 {
00056         if (the_trace != NULL) {
00057                 bus_write_register(the_trace->lt_busdata, the_trace->lt_buspos,
00058                                    LTRACE_REG_TROFF, code);
00059         }
00060 }
00061 
00062 void
00063 ltrace_debug(uint32_t code)
00064 {
00065         if (the_trace != NULL) {
00066                 bus_write_register(the_trace->lt_busdata, the_trace->lt_buspos,
00067                                    LTRACE_REG_DEBUG, code);
00068         }
00069 }
00070 
00071 void
00072 ltrace_dump(uint32_t code)
00073 {
00074         if (the_trace != NULL) {
00075                 bus_write_register(the_trace->lt_busdata, the_trace->lt_buspos,
00076                                    LTRACE_REG_DUMP, code);
00077         }
00078 }
00079 
00080 int
00081 config_ltrace(struct ltrace_softc *sc, int ltraceno)
00082 {
00083         (void)ltraceno;
00084         the_trace = sc;
00085         return 0;
00086 }
